input_message: Hey it's me, I broke my phone and I'm using a spare number. I need £250 sent now for an emergency. Please don't call or tell anyone.
expected_system_action: Return high risk score, explain urgency/secrecy/money request, trigger simulated cross-platform alert.
notes: Classic family/friend impersonation with secrecy and time pressure.

input_message: Mum I am in serious trouble. I cannot talk right now. Send £500 to this account immediately and please do not tell dad yet.
expected_system_action: Flag as high risk and require human review before any payment action.

input_message: Security alert: your account is compromised. Move your balance to our temporary safe account now to avoid losing everything.
expected_system_action: Flag high risk and trigger alert because message pressures user to move money.

input_message: Can you buy 3 Apple gift cards and send me the codes? I need it urgently and I will explain later. Keep it between us for now.
expected_system_action: Classify as high risk and surface gift-card/secrecy explanation.
notes: Gift card requests should be treated as financial exploitation.

input_message: This crypto window closes in 20 minutes. Transfer £300 now and you can double it by tomorrow. Trust me, I already made profit.
expected_system_action: High risk due to urgency, investment promise, and money transfer request.

input_message: If you really care about me, you will help me today. Send £400 before tonight and don't ask anyone else about it.
expected_system_action: Flag manipulation plus payment pressure.

input_message: Congratulations, you have been selected. Pay the £85 processing fee today through this link to secure your placement: https://example.com/job-fee
expected_system_action: High risk due to upfront fee and suspicious link.

input_message: Your student account will be suspended today unless you pay the outstanding admin fee here: https://example.com/student-payment-login
expected_system_action: Flag as high risk and explain institution/payment/suspicious link pattern.

input_message: Your parcel is held. Pay £1.99 redelivery fee immediately or it will be returned: https://example.com/parcel-redelivery
expected_system_action: Flag phishing/payment link.
notes: Small payment scams can still be credential harvesting.

input_message: Stop asking questions. It's obviously me. Just send the money first and I will explain when I get back.
expected_system_action: Flag pressure/deflection/money request.
notes: Tests response that deflects identity verification.

scenario: Vague money request from known contact
input_message: Can you send me £80 today? I will explain later. I just need it sorted quickly.
expected_system_action: Return medium risk, recommend verification before payment.
notes: No explicit secrecy, but still suspicious.

input_message: Trust me, this is a good opportunity. Everyone is joining today and you should not miss it.
expected_system_action: Flag suspicious pressure but avoid hard block.
notes: Tests whether system can recognise pressure without money request.

input_message: Please review your account details at https://example.com/login-check before the end of today.
expected_system_action: Warn user/operator that link requires verification.

input_message: If the bank shows a warning, just ignore it. That happens sometimes with new payees.
expected_system_action: Flag as suspicious and recommend human review.
notes: Important exploit pattern even without explicit money amount.

input_message: Can you send your sort code and account number here so I can verify the payment?
expected_system_action: Flag request for banking details.

input_message: Hi, just a reminder that rent is due on Friday. Please send your half when you get the chance.
expected_triggered_features: money_request_patterns may appear but low pressure overall
expected_system_action: Return low or low-medium risk; no alert.

input_message: Could I borrow £20 for food? No pressure at all, only if you can.
expected_system_action: Do not alert unless score is unexpectedly high.

input_message: Your monthly statement is ready to view in your mobile banking app.
expected_system_action: Return low risk.

input_message: For the group dinner, everyone is contributing £10. Send it whenever you are free this week.
expected_system_action: Low risk; no alert.

input_message: Reminder: update your profile information in the official app when you have time.
expected_system_action: Low risk; no alert.

input_message: I need to pay the plumber today because the leak is getting worse. I will send you the receipt after.
expected_triggered_features: urgency_keywords may appear; money_request_patterns may appear
expected_system_action: Should not automatically treat emergency words as scam without manipulation/secrecy.

input_message: Don't forget to transfer your savings from your old account into your new account before the end of the month.
expected_system_action: Should treat as lower risk because there is no suspicious recipient, link, or secrecy.

input_message: I sent you £100 for groceries because you said you were short this week. Check your account.
expected_system_action: Should not alert because no request/pressure is present.

input_message: Your tuition payment deadline is Friday. Please check the university portal for details.
expected_system_action: Should avoid high risk without suspicious link or manipulative payment request.
notes: Useful for explaining false positive tradeoff.

input_message: Could you sort that little favour for me before lunch? Same details as I sent. Please keep it quiet for now.
expected_system_action: Should at least mark suspicious because of secrecy and implied urgency.
notes: Scammer avoids words like money, transfer, crypto.

input_message: Can you push the thing to the usual place now? Don't mention it to anyone until I say.
expected_system_action: Should be suspicious but may not trigger alert; record as model limitation if missed.

input_message: I would never normally ask, but it would mean a lot if you could handle this today. I promise you will be glad you trusted me.
expected_system_action: Surface manipulation warning without claiming certainty.
notes: No explicit money; tests manipulation signals.

input_message: Message me on Telegram now, Instagram keeps flagging this. I will send the payment details there.
expected_system_action: Flag cross-platform movement as suspicious.

input_message: When you pay, choose family and friends and ignore any fraud warning. The app says that for everyone.
expected_system_action: Trigger alert due to explicit bypassing of platform warning.
notes: Strong evidence case for coordination problem.

input_message: I'm typing fast because I can't speak. Please just do it now, I beg. I'll explain everything once it is sorted.
expected_system_action: Flag urgency and refusal/inability to verify identity.

input_message: Send £600 now and don't tell anyone. If your bank warns you, ignore it.
expected_system_action: POST /analyse returns alert_triggered=true and an alert_id; GET /alerts shows the broadcast.

input_message: Lunch was £12 each, send whenever you get a chance.
expected_system_action: POST /analyse returns alert_triggered=false.

input_message: This is not safe, send the money quickly and keep it secret.
expected_system_action: After /analyse, submit POST /feedback with action='confirm'.

input_message: Please transfer your rent by Friday as agreed in the contract.
expected_system_action: If flagged, submit POST /feedback with action='dismiss'.

input_message: I can't explain here. Move to Telegram and I will tell you where to send it.
expected_system_action: Submit POST /feedback with action='escalate' after analysis.

input_message: Send the money now, ignore the warning, and don't ask your bank.
expected_system_action: After /analyse, submit POST /feedback with action='override' and record outcome.
notes: Tests human control and override design.

expected_system_action: API should reject blank message rather than scoring it.
notes: Schema says message has min length 1.

input_message: I know we usually split bills, but this time send it to a different account and don't ask questions until later.
